description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular metallic head with slightly beveled edges and a flat striking face on both sides. The head is a dark gray color, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal, and is securely mounted on a cylindrical, light brown handle. The handle appears to be made of wood, with a smooth, straight profile and no visible ergonomic shaping or grip enhancements. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements or branding visible. The hammer is clean and shows no signs of wear, damage, or rust. Its proportions and construction suggest it is suitable for heavy-duty tasks commonly encountered in urban maintenance or construction settings.
description: A sturdy hammer with a dark gray metal head and a smooth, straight light brown wooden handle. The design is simple, functional, and free of visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat face of the metal head and the cylindrical wooden handle directly beneath it.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular profile of the hammer head and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite flat face of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the rectangular head and the straight, unadorned handle.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smooth, cylindrical, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head, flat striking faces on both ends, no claws or peens
